overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark clothing walking through a desert canyon environment. The character is accompanied by a small companion creature and traverses sandy terrain between rocky cliff formations under bright sunlight, with small wildlife scattering at the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon path with scattered wildlife

events.description: small desert creatures scatter and flee from the left side of the path as the character approaches

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the sandy canyon corridor

notable_agents.action: small desert creatures scattering and running away from the character's approach
small companion creature following closely behind the character

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff formation forming the left wall of the canyon
tall rocky cliff formation forming the right wall of the canyon
undulating sand dunes covering the ground surface
large flat-topped rock formation visible in the distant haze

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a desert canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. Small creatures scatter from the left as the character approaches, while a companion follows behind. The sandy path stretches forward toward a distant mesa under bright sunlight.

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace through the canyon interior

notable_agents.action: companion creature maintaining pace behind the character

segments.scene_description: The character continues the steady trek through the canyon as the rock walls draw closer on both sides. The companion creature keeps pace behind, and the sandy terrain remains consistent. No wildlife is visible in this section of the canyon.

events.description: right canyon wall ends, opening up to expansive desert dune sea

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open desert as the canyon constraints loosen

notable_agents.action: companion creature following as the terrain opens to wider dunes

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually opens as the right cliff formation ends, revealing the expansive dune sea ahead. The left cliff recedes into the distance while the distant mesa grows larger in the frame. The character and companion continue toward the open desert.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon that gradually opens into an expansive dune sea. It begins with the character and a companion walking between steep rock walls under bright sunlight, as small creatures scatter from the path. As the trek continues, the canyon walls draw closer on both sides, tightening the frame around the steady progression across the sandy terrain. The scene then expands as the right cliff formation ends and the left wall recedes, revealing a vast desert landscape. Finally, the view opens completely toward a growing distant mesa as the character and companion move out of the canyon and into the open dunes.
